prompt: A reference image of a ballet dancer lifting one leg high with arms spread wide. I want to apply this pose to a 20s female anime character in a blue dress and generate with SDXL. How do I do this?

assertions.text: Bone values in [X,Y,Z] format for thigh and upperarm bones

assertions.text: SDXL positive prompt includes blue dress and anime character

assertions.text: ControlNet strength value in 0.7-1.0 range specified
